Our Story

Protecting What Matters
Since 2015

NMAS Innovations was built on a simple belief: every South African home and business — and every African mine site — deserves enterprise-grade technology and security.

Company Timeline

A Decade of African Innovation

2015

Founded by Mzoxolo Beqezi in South Africa

Starting as a local IT support provider for homes and businesses.

2018

First junior mining client secured

Deployed rugged cloud infrastructure for a Northern Cape mine site.

2021

24/7 NOC launched

Established a dedicated Network Operations Centre for round-the-clock remote monitoring.

2023

First in Africa — multi-language industrial support

Became the first IT company on the continent to offer full multi-language OT/SCADA support.

2024

Cape to Cairo expansion

Expanded service reach across sub-Saharan and Northern Africa.

Leadership

The Vision Behind NMAS

Mzoxolo Beqezi
Founder & CEO

Driving Innovation in SA 🚀

His hands-on approach ensures every client benefits from mining-grade reliability, whether for a home office or a remote industrial site. From securing his first mining client in 2018 to launching a 24/7 NOC in 2021, Mzoxolo has propelled NMAS from a local South African startup to a pan-African IT powerhouse.

"With a passion for technology and a vision for a connected Africa, Mzoxolo Beqezi established NMAS to bridge the gap between complex IT systems and everyday users."
Our Divisions

Two Brands, One Mission

NMAS

NMAS Innovations

IT & OT Specialists

Mining-grade cloud infrastructure, cyber security, and 24/7 remote monitoring for mine sites, businesses, and homes across Africa.

Visit NMAS Innovations
WC

WebCraft

Web Design Division

Premium web design, development, and local hosting for South African businesses. Built for speed, conversion, and brand impact.

Visit WebCraft
Core Values

What We Stand For

🔒

Security First

Every solution is built with security at its core — from home networks to SCADA systems.

🏭

Industrial-Grade

Mining-level reliability delivered to every client, regardless of scale.

🌍

Africa-Focused

Our solutions are designed for Africa's unique infrastructure challenges.

🤝

Community Commitment

We believe technology should empower communities across South Africa and the continent.

Committed to South Africa and the Continent
WC
Need a stunning website? NMAS WebCraft division handles all web design.

Empowering South Africa with top-tier IT support, security solutions, and digital innovation. Mining-grade reliability from Cape to Cairo.
